MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Fred Doughty.
Attorney, John Zanghi is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Frank Munoz is present.
Attorney, Tim J. Carlstedt is representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schrelber, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of April 02, 2013 is vacated.
